items.title: NEW YORK — Tyrese Haliburton asked LeBron James if he had a Decision to announce to everyone at Fanatics Fest during the live taping of the Mind the Game pod.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
NEW YORK — Tyrese Haliburton asked LeBron James if he had a Decision to announce to everyone at Fanatics Fest during the live taping of the Mind the Game pod.

LeBron: "We just talked about this in the back."

Haliburton: "OK, OK, I'll leave it alone."

And the podcast taping moved on.

items.title: Pistons two-way forward Isaac Jones had zero college or JUCO offers after graduating high school. So he got a job working the loading dock at Puget Sound Pipe & Supply.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Pistons two-way forward Isaac Jones had zero college or JUCO offers after graduating high school. So he got a job working the loading dock at Puget Sound Pipe & Supply.

"I always mess around and say I’m the only NBA player who's forklift-certified."

www.freep.com/story/sports...

media.title: How Isaac Jones went from forklift operator to Pistons G League standout
media.description: Before Isaac Jones ever dunked a basketball, he learned how to operate a forklift. Now he's a standout on the Pistons' G League squad.

items.title: Draymond Green Doubles Down on "Caleb Wilson is Kevin Garnett" Take
items.author: The Draymond Green Show
items.body_excerpt: "When I say, 'Caleb Wilson, floor could be Kevin Garnett.' Everybody's like, Yo, you're an idiot." - Draymond Green is breaking down his buzz-worthy take on the young Bulls' potential on The Draymond Green Show! #draymondgreen #nba #basketball #warriors #goldenstatewarriors…
